input.prompt:
Explore the MarketDetail route and its test file in the bayes-market repo at /home/kelvin/bayes-market. I need to understand:

1. Read the full content of frontend/src/routes/MarketDetail.tsx

6. Check the test setup patterns - look at other test files in frontend/src/__tests__/ for mocking patterns
7. Look for any test utilities or setup files

Be very thorough - read all relevant files completely. Report back the full content of MarketDetail.tsx and MarketDetail.test.tsx, plus the signatures/types of all hooks and components mentioned.
